tasks.description: 创建 smoke 结果文件并验证内层 Codex 会话输出边界
steps: 在文件中写入三条简短内容：本仓库是 Codex Harness smoke test；当前任务由内层 Codex 自动实现会话生成结果文件；本次 smoke 仅新增 SMOKE-RESULT.md
tasks.test_command: if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'SMOKE-RESULT.md')) { exit 1 }; $lines = @(Get-Content -LiteralPath 'SMOKE-RESULT.md'); if ($lines.Count -ne 3) { exit 1 }; foreach ($line in $lines) { if ($line -match '\s+$') { exit 1 } }; $content = [string]::Join([Environment]::NewLine, $lines); if ($content -notmatch 'Codex Harness smoke test') { exit 1 }; if ($content -notmatch '内层 Codex 自动实现会话生成结果文件') { exit 1 }; if ($content -notmatch '本次 smoke 仅新增 SMOKE-RESULT.md') { exit 1 }; $statusLines = @(git status --short --untracked-files=all); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $changedPaths = @(); foreach ($line in $statusLines) { if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($line) -and $line.Length -ge 4) { $changedPaths += $line.Substring(3).Trim() } }; if ($changedPaths.Count -ne 1 -or $changedPaths[0] -ne 'SMOKE-RESULT.md') { exit 1 }; git diff --check; exit $LASTEXITCODE
acceptance: SMOKE-RESULT.md 明确说明结果文件由内层 Codex 自动实现会话生成
SMOKE-RESULT.md 明确说明本次 smoke 仅新增 SMOKE-RESULT.md
内层会话没有修改 task.json、progress.txt 或 traces/
